basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Deoghar Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar (AIIMS Deoghar)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar (AIIMS Deoghar) Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 29 April 2026 on the official website aiimsdeoghar.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Deoghar Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: None

qualification.details: Medical Officer: Essential: MBBS from a recognized institution along with medical council registration. Preferable: MD or equivalent qualification in Psychiatry. Desirable: Experience working in the field of Addiction Medicine or Public Health, Computer knowledge (e.g., MS Office, MS Word, MS Excel), Proficiency in Hindi and English language.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the AIIMS Deoghar recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Medical Officer. This is a contractual position offered by the All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Medical Officer post in the AIIMS Deoghar recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates are required to attend the interview directly at the specified venue.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Medical Officer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Essential qualifications include an MBBS degree from a recognized institution along with medical council registration. A MD or equivalent qualification in Psychiatry is preferable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Medical Officer post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Medical Officer post is scheduled to be held on 13th May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Where is AIIMS Deoghar located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Deoghar is located in Deoghar, Jharkhand, with the pincode 814117.
